records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew... Duty's been rough lately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew... Duty's been rough lately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew... Duty's been rough lately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Feels like I'm gonna drop dead from overwork.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Feels like I'm gonna drop dead from overwork.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Feels like I'm gonna drop dead from overwork.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Given the situation, we don't have much choice. The Administration handed over the Knights of Redemption's Unique Gear to us entirely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Given the situation, we don't have much choice. The Administration handed over the Knights of Redemption's Unique Gear to us entirely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Given the situation, we don't have much choice. The Administration handed over the Knights of Redemption's Unique Gear to us entirely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's partly because of the Armament's similarity, so now the Order is tied in for good...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's partly because of the Armament's similarity, so now the Order is tied in for good...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's partly because of the Armament's similarity, so now the Order is tied in for good...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But since they joined the Gauntlet, public opinion's warmed up. Win-win, I say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But since they joined the Gauntlet, public opinion's warmed up. Win-win, I say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But since they joined the Gauntlet, public opinion's warmed up. Win-win, I say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, it's all good. Except for the part where we're stuck making endless laps around this massive base.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, it's all good. Except for the part where we're stuck making endless laps around this massive base.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, it's all good. Except for the part where we're stuck making endless laps around this massive base.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least Captain's back now. Hopefully things will calm down for a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least Captain's back now. Hopefully things will calm down for a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least Captain's back now. Hopefully things will calm down for a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You just jinxed it, man.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You just jinxed it, man.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You just jinxed it, man.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, our shift's almost done. Let's swing by the office and wrap up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, our shift's almost done. Let's swing by the office and wrap up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, our shift's almost done. Let's swing by the office and wrap up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The office? Wasn't Sir Frayder using it today?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The office? Wasn't Sir Frayder using it today?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The office? Wasn't Sir Frayder using it today?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain's orders. Just wants us to take a peek, in case something comes up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain's orders. Just wants us to take a peek, in case something comes up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain's orders. Just wants us to take a peek, in case something comes up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're not doing anything serious. Just a quick look. Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're not doing anything serious. Just a quick look. Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're not doing anything serious. Just a quick look. Don't worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apologies for the delay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apologies for the delay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apologies for the delay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It took some time to avoid the other knights' attention.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It took some time to avoid the other knights' attention.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It took some time to avoid the other knights' attention.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You insolent brat...! You sure talk like you've done nothing wrong!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You insolent brat...! You sure talk like you've done nothing wrong!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You insolent brat...! You sure talk like you've done nothing wrong!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you clearly. This was your chance to crush Blue Shift once and for all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you clearly. This was your chance to crush Blue Shift once and for all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you clearly. This was your chance to crush Blue Shift once and for all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you lost, not even to the former captain, but to the current one?! What was Carantisir even doing?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you lost, not even to the former captain, but to the current one?! What was Carantisir even doing?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you lost, not even to the former captain, but to the current one?! What was Carantisir even doing?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every battlefield has its variables.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every battlefield has its variables.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every battlefield has its variables.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And considering her arrangements, she was never a lightweight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And considering her arrangements, she was never a lightweight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And considering her arrangements, she was never a lightweight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bold words for a kid who just joined the Order!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bold words for a kid who just joined the Order!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bold words for a kid who just joined the Order!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, pawns are pawns. Can't expect much more than that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, pawns are pawns. Can't expect much more than that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, pawns are pawns. Can't expect much more than that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, I still hold the real power over the Order... This is nothing more than a brief delay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, I still hold the real power over the Order... This is nothing more than a brief delay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, I still hold the real power over the Order... This is nothing more than a brief delay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the item I asked for?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the item I asked for?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the item I asked for?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Acting all smug when you couldn't even do your job right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Acting all smug when you couldn't even do your job right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Acting all smug when you couldn't even do your job right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the Unique Gear from the Knights of Redemption currently in our care.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the Unique Gear from the Knights of Redemption currently in our care.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the Unique Gear from the Knights of Redemption currently in our care.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this, there should be no more failures next time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this, there should be no more failures next time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this, there should be no more failures next time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I've checked. The Armament is real.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I've checked. The Armament is real.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I've checked. The Armament is real.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which means your role is done.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which means your role is done.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which means your role is done.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... betrayed me...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... betrayed me...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... betrayed me...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your greed tarnished our honor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your greed tarnished our honor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your greed tarnished our honor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we purge you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we purge you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we purge you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... How dare you...?!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... How dare you...?!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... How dare you...?!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: K-kuh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: K-kuh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: K-kuh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Frayder? We heard a loud noise inside. Are you all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Frayder? We heard a loud noise inside. Are you all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Frayder? We heard a loud noise inside. Are you all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please respond, Sir Frayder. Are you in there?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Please respond, Sir Frayder. Are you in there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Khhhkk?!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Khhhkk?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh? What just happened?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh? What just happened?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh? What just happened?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That person on the floor... Isn't that Sir Frayder?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That person on the floor... Isn't that Sir Frayder?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What the
8g?!!

What the
8g?!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoever you are, drop whatever you're holding! That item is far too dangerous to handle recklessly!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoever you are, drop whatever you're holding! That item is far too dangerous to handle recklessly!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surrender now, and I'll guarantee your life is spared!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surrender now, and I'll guarantee your life is spared!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surrender now, and I'll guarantee your life is spared!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You speak like you know something about this Armament.

records.m_Talk_FRA: You speak like you know something about this Armament.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then let me return the favor. This isn't something your kind has any business touching.

records.m_Talk_FRA: State your identity!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really your duty to demand my identity?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really your duty to demand my identity?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... As a fellow knight, I'll grant your request.
